You’re something else, aren’t you?
HGSS.633.0002:
[0103,0000,0000]...is that you?\f
You’re something else, aren’t you?
HGSS.633.0003:
Oh, hey, this is the Bike Shop! I’ve
been selling a lot of Bikes lately!\f
It’s because you’ve been riding around
on that Bike advertising for me!\f
I was wondering how best to thank you,
and I thought I’d just give you\r
that Bicycle you’re riding around.\f
It’s yours! Thanks so much!
